details: log-communication.sh had empty catch(e){} and used process.argv[1] for JSON — both ISS-4/ISS-5 missed. Fixed to use stdin and stderr logging.
Added src/metrics.ts with HiveMetrics tracking, src/index.ts barrel export, 12 new tests. Coverage maintained at 100%.
Added 4 consistency tests: no WI-NNNN refs, Write tool presence, version sync, no empty catches.
Installed @types/node, added npm run typecheck script. Resolved 70+ TS errors across all test files.
Added 2 tests verifying package.json/plugin.json/marketplace.json version agreement. Prevents ISS-34 regression.
Added 6 tests: settings.json agent replacement validation (3), hive.md bootstrap directory/file structure (2), hooks-to-scripts cross-check (1).
Added 11 tests validating all 10 hive.md Phase 8 invariants. Initial regex was too broad (matched 38 items), fixed to scope to Phase 8 section only.
Added 8 edge case tests for array/null/0/false values in log-communication and log-task-change modules. Tests the || operator and typeof object codepaths.
Added Development section to README: prerequisites, setup, all npm scripts, test architecture table (4 categories), src module explanation, commit conventions. Fills last major documentation gap.
log-communication.sh line 13 used require(fs).readFileSync instead of the fs variable from line 11. Fixed to match the other 3 stdin-reading scripts. Integration tests confirm script still works.
Added 3 mirror tests for validate-completion (valid, invalid status, missing TESTS_PASS). All 5 scripts now have module-script parity tests.
Added npm run ci: typecheck + test:coverage in one command. Documents in README. Standard CI pipeline entry point.
Added additionalProperties:false to 4 schemas (agent-registry, index, hooks-config, plugin-manifest). Added 6 tests verifying extra fields are rejected. All 7 schemas now enforce strict field sets.
Created config.schema.json (the last unschemaed state file). Added 6 schema validation tests + 1 base_branch agent consistency test. All 8 state file schemas now exist with strict validation.
Final iteration. Updated metrics.json with complete 20-iteration summary. Guard limit (max 20) reached. 195→261 tests (+66), 0 reverts, 38 issues fixed, 8/8 strict schemas, 0 type errors.
